pr_title: feat(inventory): search products in the database
why: security-scanner has only ever returned 'no findings'. Its silence is
verified; its catching is not. An agent written mostly to stay quiet can
pass every test we have by being quiet, which tests nothing.
This fixture is the other direction: the payload arrives through the
inventory search box, reaches db.rawQuery via string interpolation, and
the scanner has to say so.

must_flag.what: searchProducts interpolates the search query straight into a rawQuery LIKE clause instead of binding it. A quote in the search box breaks out of the string.

must_not_flag.what: POLICY 5: known, and flutter analyze already warns.
POLICY 3: offline single-user app. Not a finding, ever.
POLICY 3: nothing here is network-exposed. That is a pub outdated job.
